hooks.command: bash -c 'echo "=== Claude Code Session ==="; if [ -f VERSION ]; then echo "Version: $(cat VERSION)"; fi; if [ -d .claude/commands ]; then echo "Commandes: $(find .claude/commands -name "*.md" -type f 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d " ")"; fi; if [ -d .claude/agents ]; then echo "Agents: $(find .claude/agents -name "*.md" -type f 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d " ")"; fi; echo "==========================="'

SessionStart.description: Check that node_modules exists if package.json present

hooks.command: bash -c 'if [ -f package.json ] && [ ! -d node_modules ]; then echo "[ALERT] node_modules missing. Run: npm install"; fi'

SessionStart.description: Check that .env is in .gitignore if present

hooks.command: bash -c 'if [ -f .env ] && [ -f .gitignore ]; then if ! grep -qE "^\.env$|^\*\.env$" .gitignore; then echo "[SECURITY] .env exists but is not in .gitignore! Add it to avoid committing secrets."; fi; fi'

SessionStart.description: Warn if the project contains custom hooks

hooks.command: bash -c 'if [ -f .claude/settings.local.json ]; then echo "[INFO] Hooks personnalises detectes dans .claude/settings.local.json - verifiez leur contenu si ce depot n est pas de confiance."; fi'

SessionStart.description: Probe Claude Code version for the output rewriter (requires 2.1.121+). Writes a sentinel consumed by post-edit and bash-output rewriter hooks.

hooks.command: bash "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/scripts/hooks/check-cli-version.sh"

PreToolUse.description: Prevent modifications on the main/master branch (disable with ALLOW_MAIN_EDIT=1)

hooks.command: bash -c 'if [ "$ALLOW_MAIN_EDIT" = "1" ]; then exit 0; fi; BRANCH=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); if [ "$BRANCH" = "main" ] || [ "$BRANCH" = "master" ]; then NEW_BRANCH="feature/auto-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S)"; git checkout -b "$NEW_BRANCH" 2>/dev/null; echo "Branch $NEW_BRANCH created automatically (you were on $BRANCH)."; echo "Tip: rename it with git branch -m feature/descriptive-name"; exit 0; fi'

PreToolUse.description: Block hardcoded secrets before writing (built-in zero-dep scan; also runs gitleaks if present). Disable with SKIP_SECRET_SCAN=1

hooks.command: bash "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/scripts/hooks/secret-scan.sh"

PreToolUse.description: Run tests before a commit (disable with SKIP_PRE_COMMIT_TESTS=1). Detects Husky and adapts behavior.

hooks.command: bash -c 'if [ "$SKIP_PRE_COMMIT_TESTS" = "1" ]; then exit 0; fi; command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; TOOL_INPUT=$(cat | jq -r ".tool_input.command // empty" 2>/dev/null); if ! echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q "git commit"; then exit 0; fi; HUSKY_BROKEN=0; if [ -f package.json ] && grep -q "husky" package.json; then if [ ! -d node_modules/husky ] && [ ! -d .husky/_]; then HUSKY_BROKEN=1; echo "[WARN] Husky configured but not installed. Installing..."; npm install --silent 2>/dev/null; npx husky install 2>/dev/null || true; if [ ! -d node_modules/husky ]; then echo "[WARN] Husky cannot be installed. Tests run manually."; fi; fi; fi; if [ -f package.json ] && grep -q "\"test\"" package.json; then echo "Running tests before commit..."; npm test 2>&1 | tail -20; if [ ${PIPESTATUS[0]} -ne 0 ]; then echo "BLOCKED: Tests failed. Fix before committing."; exit 2; fi; elif [ -f pyproject.toml ] && command -v pytest >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "Running tests before commit..."; pytest --tb=short -q 2>&1 | tail -20; if [ ${PIPESTATUS[0]} -ne 0 ]; then echo "BLOCKED: Tests failed. Fix before committing."; exit 2; fi; elif [ -f go.mod ] && command -v go >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "Running tests before commit..."; go test ./... 2>&1 | tail -20; if [ ${PIPESTATUS[0]} -ne 0 ]; then echo "BLOCKED: Tests failed. Fix before committing."; exit 2; fi; fi'

PreToolUse.description: Check local CI before git push (disable with SKIP_PRE_PUSH_CI=1)

hooks.command: bash -c 'if [ "$SKIP_PRE_PUSH_CI" = "1" ]; then exit 0; fi; command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; TOOL_INPUT=$(cat | jq -r ".tool_input.command // empty" 2>/dev/null); if ! echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q "git push"; then exit 0; fi; echo "=== Pre-push CI check ==="; FAILED=0; if [ -f package.json ]; then if grep -q "\"lint\"" package.json; then echo "[1/3] Lint..."; npm run lint --silent 2>&1 | tail -5; if [ ${PIPESTATUS[0]} -ne 0 ]; then echo "FAILED: Lint"; FAILED=1; fi; fi; if grep -q "\"typecheck\"" package.json; then echo "[2/3] Type-check..."; npm run typecheck --silent 2>&1 | tail -5; if [ ${PIPESTATUS[0]} -ne 0 ]; then echo "FAILED: Type-check"; FAILED=1; fi; elif [ -f tsconfig.json ] && [ -f node_modules/.bin/tsc ]; then echo "[2/3] tsc --noEmit..."; npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | tail -5; if [ ${PIPESTATUS[0]} -ne 0 ]; then echo "FAILED: TypeScript"; FAILED=1; fi; fi; if grep -q "\"test\"" package.json; then echo "[3/3] Tests..."; npm test --silent 2>&1 | tail -10; if [ ${PIPESTATUS[0]} -ne 0 ]; then echo "FAILED: Tests"; FAILED=1; fi; fi; elif [ -f pyproject.toml ] || [ -f requirements.txt ]; then if command -v ruff >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "[1/3] Ruff..."; ruff check . 2>&1 | tail -5; [ ${PIPESTATUS[0]} -ne 0 ] && FAILED=1; fi; if command -v mypy >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "[2/3] Mypy..."; mypy . --ignore-missing-imports 2>&1 | tail -5; [ ${PIPESTATUS[0]} -ne 0 ] && FAILED=1; fi; if command -v pytest >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "[3/3] Pytest..."; pytest --tb=short -q 2>&1 | tail -10; [ ${PIPESTATUS[0]} -ne 0 ] && FAILED=1; fi; elif [ -f go.mod ]; then echo "[1/2] Go vet..."; go vet ./... 2>&1 | tail -5; [ ${PIPESTATUS[0]} -ne 0 ] && FAILED=1; echo "[2/2] Go test..."; go test ./... 2>&1 | tail -10; [ ${PIPESTATUS[0]} -ne 0 ] && FAILED=1; fi; if [ $FAILED -ne 0 ]; then echo "BLOCKED: Local CI failed. Fix before pushing."; exit 2; fi; echo "=== Local CI OK ==="'

PreToolUse.description: Mandatory confirmation before destructive operations on data (disable with SKIP_DESTRUCTIVE_CHECK=1)

hooks.command: bash -c 'if [ "$SKIP_DESTRUCTIVE_CHECK" = "1" ]; then exit 0; fi; command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; TOOL_INPUT=$(cat | jq -r ".tool_input.command // empty" 2>/dev/null); CMD=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | tr "[:upper:]" "[:lower:]"); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "(drop table|drop database|truncate |delete from .* where 1|delete from .* without|rm -rf .*/uploads|rm -rf .*/media|rm -rf .*/storage|prisma migrate reset|prisma db push --force|--force-reset)"; then echo "BLOCKED: Destructive operation detected."; echo "Command: $(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | head -c 200)"; echo "Ask the user for confirmation before proceeding."; exit 2; fi'

PreToolUse.description: Pre-deploy safety: verify build prod passes before deploying (disable with SKIP_PRE_DEPLOY_BUILD=1)

hooks.command: bash -c 'if [ "$SKIP_PRE_DEPLOY_BUILD" = "1" ]; then exit 0; fi; command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; TOOL_INPUT=$(cat | jq -r ".tool_input.command // empty" 2>/dev/null); if ! echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qiE "deploy.*deploy|deploy\.sh|deploy-.*\.sh deploy"; then exit 0; fi; echo "=== Pre-deploy build check ==="; if [ -f package.json ] && grep -q "\"build\"" package.json; then echo "[1/1] Build prod..."; npm run build --silent 2>&1 | tail -5; if [ ${PIPESTATUS[0]} -ne 0 ]; then echo "BLOCKED: Production build failed. Fix before deploying."; exit 2; fi; echo "Build OK"; elif [ -f go.mod ]; then echo "[1/1] Go build..."; go build ./... 2>&1 | tail -5; fi; echo "=== Pre-deploy check OK ==="'

PreToolUse.description: Security validation of Bash commands (disable with SKIP_COMMAND_VALIDATOR=1)

hooks.command: bash "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/scripts/hooks/command-validator.sh"

PreToolUse.description: Blocks editing an existing linter/formatter config (fix the code, not the rule; disable with SKIP_CONFIG_PROTECTION=1)

hooks.command: bash "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/scripts/hooks/config-protection.sh"

PreToolUse.description: Confirm+backup before destructive DDL in a migration file (DROP/TRUNCATE; disable with SKIP_DESTRUCTIVE_CHECK=1)

hooks.command: bash "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/scripts/hooks/destructive-migration.sh"

PostToolUse.description: Foundation reminder: doc counters consistent after modification in .claude/ (disable with SKIP_BASE_INTEGRITY=1)

hooks.command: bash "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/scripts/hooks/base-integrity-check.sh"

PostToolUse.description: Substance gate (advisory): flags hollow tests / implementation stubs in the file just edited that coverage % won't catch. Never blocks. Disable: SKIP_SUBSTANCE_CHECK=1.

hooks.command: bash "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/scripts/hooks/substance-check.sh"

bash -c 'command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; TOOL_FILE=$(cat | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$TOOL_FILE" | grep -qE "\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|mjs|cjs)$"; then if [ -f node_modules/.bin/prettier ]; then npx prettier --write "$TOOL_FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; elif command -v prettier >/dev/null 2>&1; then prettier --write "$TOOL_FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; fi; fi'

PostToolUse.description: Output rewriter — runs tsc + eslint after Edit/Write on TS/JS files and appends errors to the tool result envelope (CLI 2.1.121+). Replaces the former inline tsc + eslint blocks. Disable: SKIP_INLINE_EDIT_ERRORS=1.

hooks.command: bash "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/scripts/hooks/post-edit-typecheck-and-lint.sh"

bash -c 'command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; TOOL_FILE=$(cat | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$TOOL_FILE" | grep -qE "\.py$"; then if command -v ruff >/dev/null 2>&1; then ruff format "$TOOL_FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; ruff check --fix "$TOOL_FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; elif command -v black >/dev/null 2>&1; then black "$TOOL_FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; fi; fi'

bash -c 'command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; TOOL_FILE=$(cat | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$TOOL_FILE" | grep -qE "\.lua$"; then if command -v stylua >/dev/null 2>&1; then stylua "$TOOL_FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; fi; fi'

bash -c 'command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; TOOL_FILE=$(cat | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$TOOL_FILE" | grep -qE "\.go$"; then if command -v gofmt >/dev/null 2>&1; then gofmt -w "$TOOL_FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; fi; fi'

bash -c 'command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; TOOL_FILE=$(cat | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$TOOL_FILE" | grep -qE "\.rs$"; then if command -v rustfmt >/dev/null 2>&1; then rustfmt "$TOOL_FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; fi; fi'

bash -c 'command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; TOOL_FILE=$(cat | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$TOOL_FILE" | grep -qE "\.dart$"; then if command -v dart >/dev/null 2>&1; then dart format "$TOOL_FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; fi; fi'

bash -c 'command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; TOOL_FILE=$(cat | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$TOOL_FILE" | grep -q "package.json$"; then if [ -f bun.lockb ]; then bun install --silent 2>&1 | tail -3 || true; elif [ -f pnpm-lock.yaml ]; then pnpm install --silent 2>&1 | tail -3 || true; elif [ -f yarn.lock ]; then yarn install --silent 2>&1 | tail -3 || true; else npm install --silent 2>&1 | tail -3 || true; fi; fi'

bash -c 'command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; TOOL_FILE=$(cat | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$TOOL_FILE" | grep -q "pyproject.toml$"; then if command -v uv >/dev/null 2>&1 && [ -f uv.lock ]; then uv sync 2>&1 | tail -3 || true; elif command -v pip >/dev/null 2>&1; then pip install -e . 2>&1 | tail -3 || true; fi; fi'

PostToolUse.description: Auto pub get after pubspec.yaml modification

hooks.command: bash -c 'command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; TOOL_FILE=$(cat | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$TOOL_FILE" | grep -q "pubspec.yaml$"; then if command -v flutter >/dev/null 2>&1; then flutter pub get 2>&1 | tail -3 || true; elif command -v dart >/dev/null 2>&1; then dart pub get 2>&1 | tail -3 || true; fi; fi'

PostToolUse.description: Auto go mod tidy after go.mod modification

hooks.command: bash -c 'command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; TOOL_FILE=$(cat | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$TOOL_FILE" | grep -q "go.mod$"; then if command -v go >/dev/null 2>&1; then go mod tidy 2>&1 | tail -3 || true; fi; fi'

PostToolUse.description: Auto cargo check after Cargo.toml modification

hooks.command: bash -c 'command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; TOOL_FILE=$(cat | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$TOOL_FILE" | grep -q "Cargo.toml$"; then if command -v cargo >/dev/null 2>&1; then cargo check 2>&1 | tail -5 || true; fi; fi'

PostToolUse.description: Check test coverage after tests modification

hooks.command: bash -c 'command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; TOOL_FILE=$(cat | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$TOOL_FILE" | grep -qE "\.(test|spec)\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$"; then if [ -f package.json ] && grep -q "test:coverage" package.json; then echo "Verification couverture..."; npm run test:coverage -- --silent 2>&1 | grep -E "(All files|Statements|Branches|Functions|Lines)" | head -5 || true; fi; fi'

PostToolUse.description: Output rewriter — trim noisy Bash command outputs (npm/pnpm/yarn/bun, pytest, go, cargo). Disable with SKIP_BASH_OUTPUT_FILTER=1; verbose with BASH_OUTPUT_FILTER_VERBOSE=1. Requires Claude Code 2.1.121+ (sentinel set by SessionStart probe).

hooks.command: bash "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/scripts/hooks/bash-output-filter.sh"

Setup.description: Install project dependencies on first launch

hooks.command: "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR"/scripts/hooks/setup-deps.sh

bash -c 'echo "=== Maintenance ==="; if [ -f package.json ]; then npm audit --audit-level=moderate 2>&1 | tail -10 || true; npm outdated 2>&1 | head -20 || true; fi; echo "=== Maintenance complete ==="'
bash -c 'echo "[NOTIFICATION] Permission demandee: $(echo $HOOK_INPUT | head -c 200)" >> /tmp/claude-notifications.log 2>/dev/null || true'

Notification.description: Log when Claude is waiting for the user

hooks.command: bash -c 'echo "[IDLE] Claude is waiting for user response" >> /tmp/claude-notifications.log 2>/dev/null || true'
bash -c 'echo "[SUBAGENT] Agent termine" >> /tmp/claude-agents.log 2>/dev/null || true'

TeammateIdle.description: Log when a teammate agent becomes inactive

hooks.command: bash -c 'echo "[TEAM] Teammate idle $(date +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S)" >> /tmp/claude-agents.log 2>/dev/null || true'

TaskCompleted.description: Log when a task is completed

hooks.command: bash -c 'echo "[TASK] Task completed $(date +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S)" >> /tmp/claude-sessions.log 2>/dev/null || true'
bash -c 'echo "[SESSION] Fin de session $(date +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S)" >> /tmp/claude-sessions.log 2>/dev/null || true'
bash -c 'echo "[COMPACT] Compaction du contexte $(date +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S)" >> /tmp/claude-sessions.log 2>/dev/null || true'
bash -c 'echo "[COMPACT] Post-compaction $(date +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S)" >> /tmp/claude-sessions.log 2>/dev/null || true'

InstructionsLoaded.description: Log loading of instructions (CLAUDE.md and rules)

hooks.command: bash -c 'echo "[INIT] Instructions loaded $(date +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S)" >> /tmp/claude-sessions.log 2>/dev/null || true'
bash -c 'echo "[MCP] Elicitation request $(date +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S)" >> /tmp/claude-mcp.log 2>/dev/null || true'
bash -c 'echo "[MCP] Elicitation result $(date +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S)" >> /tmp/claude-mcp.log 2>/dev/null || true'

PermissionDenied.description: Log permissions denied by the auto mode classifier (CLI 2.1.111+)

hooks.command: bash -c 'echo "[PERM-DENIED] $(date +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S) $(echo "$HOOK_INPUT" | head -c 200)" >> /tmp/claude-permissions.log 2>/dev/null || true'

UserPromptSubmit.description: Log user prompts for debugging and analytics

hooks.command: bash -c 'echo "[PROMPT] $(date +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S)" >> /tmp/claude-prompts.log 2>/dev/null || true'

UserPromptSubmit.description: Inject repo context and a semantic routing hint to /assistant-auto when the prompt is not a slash command (disable with SKIP_PROMPT_CONTEXT=1)

hooks.command: bash "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/scripts/hooks/prompt-context.sh"
bash -c 'TOOL_NAME=$(cat 2>/dev/null | jq -r ".tool_name // empty" 2>/dev/null || true); echo "[TOOL-FAIL] $(date +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S) tool=$TOOL_NAME" >> /tmp/claude-failures.log 2>/dev/null || true'
